name: Roasted Corn Tortillas (from My Garden)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the cheese and tortillas.
2. Place one tortilla on a plate.
3. Layer the salsa mixture over the tortilla.
4. Sprinkle the cheese over the salsa.
5. Top with another tortilla.
6. Drizzle with additional salsa if desired.
7. Serve immediately.
